name: Banana-Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream shortening and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Stir in mashed bananas.
5. Add dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
6. Gently mix in chopped nuts.
7. Spoon batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
8. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with homemade jam or jelly.
